user.title: Select Protocol Type
user.description:
Choose the communication protocol for your Pylontech US5000.

**Console Protocol**: Recommended for Waveshare RS232-to-Ethernet converters (Standard Port 4196)
**Binary Protocol**: Standard Pylontech binary frame protocol (Port 8234)

connection.title: Configure Connection
connection.description: Enter connection details for your Pylontech US5000 (Waveshare Edition) using {protocol} protocol.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Waveshare Adapter

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
